top_gap_prompt: Best automation that works with GitHub and Postgres
category_long: open-source workflow automation for technical operations teams

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: n8n's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: n8n is under-represented in third-party 'best automation' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: n8n lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best automation that works with GitHub and Postgres
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: automation tools with native GitHub integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which automation software should a Technical Ops Lead or Developer wanting self-hosted automation use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
